'''Lootra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Telos IV]]. He was separated from his wife, [[Aaida]] during the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]]{{'s}} [[Bombing of Telos IV|bombing]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[3958 BBY]]. Lootra had come to Nar Shaddaa following the end of the Mandalorian Wars, searching for his lost wife Aaida. Nar Shaddaa was his last hope of trying to find her, where he almost gave up hope.
{{GameLSmechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords}}
Lootra encountered [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|Exile]] [[Meetra Surik]], who offered to help him. Surik rescued Aaida, who was being oppressed at the Refugee Sector, along with several others by the [[Exchange]], and the couple was reunited.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Dialogue with Lootra triggers the "Intergalactic Reunification" quest, in which the character may decide to reunite him with Aaida. Dialogue upon completion will gain you influence with your crew. If [[Kreia]] is in your party and you give too many kind words to the couple, Kreia will comment on your weakness. If you tell them to help other people as you helped them, Kreia will instead be impressed that you inspired them to help others and you will gain influence along with light side points. His reward for Surik is a random part to creating a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. If Surik has already built her first saber, Lootra will instead reward Surik with a lightsaber of which the color and type will be random.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

Alternatively, the player may convince Lootra, using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] or persuasion, to give up on finding Aaida.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />
